question: Is 'calibrated conformal prediction + default-deny decision gate for single-cell Perturb-seq perturbation-effect prediction' novel?

negative_signal_pubmed.note: No PubMed record couples conformal prediction OR selective abstention to Perturb-seq / perturbation-effect prediction.

closest_prior_art.name: PRESCRIBE
closest_prior_art.what: Deep-evidential-regression Bayesian UQ emitting a per-prediction confidence score for single-cell perturbation-effect prediction; score correlates with accuracy and is used to FILTER untrustworthy predictions.
closest_prior_art.difference: Self-concordant Bayesian/evidential UQ; NOT conformal (no distribution-free coverage), NOT a commit gate, NOT grounded in orthogonal genetic evidence.

closest_prior_art.name: Conformal inference for reliable single-cell RNA-seq annotation
closest_prior_art.difference: Conformal in single-cell but task is cell-type ANNOTATION (classification), not perturbation regression; no LODO, no orthogonal gate.

closest_prior_art.name: Conformal selective prediction w/ cost-aware deferral for clinical triage
closest_prior_art.difference: Establishes conformal+abstention+deferral pattern but in clinical triage; deferral to human, not gated on genetics.

closest_prior_art.name: Uncertainty-aware synthetic lethality prediction w/ foundation models
closest_prior_art.difference: USES conformal prediction (calibrated prediction sets) on a perturbation-adjacent genomics task — so it is closer prior art than first assessed. Differs: task is synthetic-lethality gene PAIRS (classification) from in-silico KOs, NOT Perturb-seq perturbation-effect regression; no leave-one-donor-out exchangeability, no default-deny COMMIT gate, and trust is NOT grounded in orthogonal causal-genetics evidence.
closest_prior_art.what: Cilantro-sl: foundation-model in-silico gene knockouts + CONFORMAL prediction producing calibrated, interpretable prediction sets to prioritize high-confidence synthetic-lethality candidates.

closest_prior_art.name: Perturbation-prediction benchmarks (PertEval-scFM, PerturBench, VCC/Cell-Eval, systematic comparison 2024.12.23.630036)
closest_prior_art.difference: Evaluate point-prediction accuracy only; none add calibrated abstention, trust score, or commit gate.

what_is_novel: Ingredients all exist; the specific ASSEMBLY does not. New = a default-deny COMMIT GATE for Perturb-seq perturbation-effect prediction whose trust signal is (i) a distribution-free CONFORMAL score under leave-one-donor-out exchangeability with an explicit honesty caveat, AND (ii) gated on ORTHOGONAL, non-self-concordant genetic evidence (cell-type-matched eQTL direction-consistency + GWAS/OT genetic association) rather than the model's own uncertainty. The evidence-grounding move — independent causal-genetics corroboration required before a GO — has no direct precedent in perturbation-prediction UQ.
plausible_published_tier: ~58-65 (Nobel-anchored). Well-powered published version = competent novel-combination methods paper (Bioinformatics / Genome Biology methods tier). NOT first-of-kind (conformal-in-single-cell and UQ-for-perturbation both published 2025), NOT field-changing. Upper end (~65) only if the orthogonal-evidence gate is shown to beat self-concordant UQ (PRESCRIBE-style) on a POWERED downstream validation.
honest_verdict: Novelty is real but bounded and cannot alone deliver +20 to ~72. PRESCRIBE (Oct 2025) already claims a per-prediction confidence score for single-cell perturbation prediction, so the 'pLDDT for perturbation' framing is no longer first-of-kind. Defensible novelty is narrower: conformal trust score + DEFAULT-DENY gate grounded in ORTHOGONAL genetics — a legitimate novel-combination worth ~58-65 published. Exceeding that requires the EMPIRICAL axis: a powered demonstration that the orthogonal-evidence gate makes decisions a self-concordant UQ baseline provably would not. Absent that head-to-head, novelty alone tops out well below 72 — consistent with the honesty contract.
